MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Cindy Lee represented Plaintiff, Sylvia Lee and Defendant Tiffany Parisi appeared in pro per. The cause did not settled and remains on the trial calendar.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Tiffany Parisi, defendant and moving party in propria persona. Cindy Lee, Esq., Feng & Lee, 885-5800, for plaintiff and opposing party Sylvia Lee.
*A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling --DEFENDANT TIFFANY PARISI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT--Demurrer overruled. Defendant has 10 days to answer. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301/DR)
